description: Wave 0 - M11 Quality Framework: Create test infrastructure, contract validation tooling, CI-compatible test runners, and scenario test framework. Branch: feat/m11-quality-framework
steps: Create tests/contract/validate_schemas_test.go that loads all contracts/*.schema.json and validates them as valid JSON Schema
Create tests/contract/validate_envelope_test.go that validates sample events against event-envelope-v1.schema.json
Create tests/scenarios/README.md explaining scenario runner format (YAML/JSON based)
Create tests/scenarios/schema.json defining the scenario file format
Create tests/scenarios/basic_occupied_running.json - basic scenario: Zone OCCUPIED + Equipment RUNNING = STOP_REQUEST
Create tests/scenarios/stale_no_restart.json - STALE state blocks restart
Create tests/scenarios/camera_offline_unknown.json - camera offline = UNKNOWN, not VACANT
Create scripts/run-contract-tests.sh that validates all JSON schemas and runs contract tests
Create scripts/run-scenario-tests.sh placeholder that will be completed when the engine exists
Update Makefile test-contract target to call scripts/run-contract-tests.sh
Ensure make test-contract passes with the new validation
Create tests/unit/README.md explaining test conventions for the project
acceptance_criteria: make test-contract passes validating all schema files
Scenario JSON files are valid against their schema
Test infrastructure is reusable by subsequent module PRs
Contract tests verify that VACANT_CONFIRMED is the only valid vacancy state
verification: python3 scripts/check-json.py succeeds (all JSON files valid)
